productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Light Winter Black Tops
description: Composition Black round neck t-shirt made of 100% pique cotton, has full sleeves with mid sleeve buttoned flap and graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Flaunt your feminine pride in style with this t-shirt from united colors of benetton. The graphic print oozes high society courteous living, and the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this with jeans and heeled sandals for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
